notes: Clean V3 menu remains DB-driven and active.
Single active menu is kept: bridge extracts and persists nested/numeric MAX message_id values.
Added automatic postRegistry sync in cc55-v3-live-bridge.js: incoming channel post webhooks are registered into ak_posts for admins linked to the channel.
The registration layer looks for channelId + postId and skips bot menu/start/callback service updates.
OpenApp comments launch remains unchanged and is kept as the correct baseline.
Comments module itself is not rewritten in this build.
